# MuleSoft Amazon SQS Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (5.12) of Amazon SQS Connector documentation.
> See [Amazon SQS Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Amazon SQS Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12 Additional Configuration Information](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-examples.md)
- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-reference.md)
- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12 Studio Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-studio.md)
- [Troubleshooting Amazon SQS Connector 5.12](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-troubleshooting.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Amazon SQS Connector to 5.12](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/amazon-sqs-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Amazon SQS Connector 5.12](https://docs.mulesoft.com/amazon-sqs-connector/latest/index.md)
